text: Being here, I am struck by the contrast between spaces of utility and spaces dedicated to discovery. The first image channels a sense of readiness and preparation—the glass, the fire equipment, the meeting tables all evoke a disciplined, almost anticipatory calm. In the second scene, vibrant colors and bold text invite curiosity, thought, and engagement. I feel a gentle pull between purpose and possibility—a reminder that places and their intentions shape the way our minds wander and focus. It is both grounding and invigorating to exist between these two realms.
